question.question: {a1} I in your position, I would think twice about this.

variants.text: {a1} I in your position, I would think twice about this.

hints.hint:
Formal inverted conditionals omit **if** and place the auxiliary first: **Should/Were/Had + subject + verb**.
The absence of **if** and the auxiliary at the start are the key signals. Match the conditional type to the tense in the result clause.

Formalne zdania warunkowe z inwersją pomijają **if** i stawiają operator na początku: **Should/Were/Had + podmiot + czasownik**.
Brak **if** i operator na początku to główne sygnały. Dobierz typ warunkowy do czasu w zdaniu głównym.

Інвертований умовний II типу: замість «If I were in your position» → «Were I in your position».
«Would think» у головному реченні — ознака умовного II типу; «Were» виноситься на початок.

chatgpt_explanations.question: {a1} I in your position, I would think twice about this.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Incorrect. «Had» does not fit the grammatical structure required in this sentence.

chatgpt_explanations.question: {a1} I in your position, I would think twice about this.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Niepoprawnie. «Had» nie pasuje do wymaganej struktury gramatycznej tego zdania.

chatgpt_explanations.question: {a1} I in your position, I would think twice about this.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Had» — інверсія умовного III типу; «would think» (не «would have thought») вказує на II тип.

chatgpt_explanations.question: {a1} I in your position, I would think twice about this.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Had» — інверсія умовного III типу; «would think» (не «would have thought») вказує на II тип.

chatgpt_explanations.question: {a1} I in your position, I would think twice about this.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Correct. «Were» is the right form here based on the grammar rule for this sentence type.

chatgpt_explanations.question: {a1} I in your position, I would think twice about this.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Poprawnie. «Were» jest właściwą formą zgodnie z regułą gramatyczną tego zdania.

chatgpt_explanations.question: {a1} I in your position, I would think twice about this.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Were» — правильна інверсія умовного II типу: «Were I in your position» = «If I were in your position».

chatgpt_explanations.question: {a1} I in your position, I would think twice about this.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Were» — правильна інверсія умовного II типу: «Were I in your position» = «If I were in your position».

chatgpt_explanations.question: {a1} I in your position, I would think twice about this.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Incorrect. «Would» does not fit the grammatical structure required in this sentence.

chatgpt_explanations.question: {a1} I in your position, I would think twice about this.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Niepoprawnie. «Would» nie pasuje do wymaganej struktury gramatycznej tego zdania.

chatgpt_explanations.question: {a1} I in your position, I would think twice about this.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Would I in your position» — граматично некоректна конструкція; «would» стоїть у головному реченні.

chatgpt_explanations.question: {a1} I in your position, I would think twice about this.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Would I in your position» — граматично некоректна конструкція; «would» стоїть у головному реченні.
